overall.description: First-person exploration of a cyberpunk bar called Madame Sauvage's Place in a sci-fi game setting. The player enters from a dark industrial alley, walks through the neon-lit interior with green ambient lighting and geometric chandeliers, explores the upper level interacting with a seated NPC, then exits back to the urban street.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark industrial alley at night, approaching the entrance to Madame Sauvage's Place. The camera moves toward the illuminated signage and enters a narrow corridor with yellow vertical lights, passing two guards standing near the entrance.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a spacious cyberpunk bar with dominant green neon lighting. The camera walks past the illuminated bar counter where patrons are seated, moving toward the back of the establishment. The geometric chandelier hangs prominently from the industrial ceiling, and the upper balcony level is visible above.

reaching the upper balcony overlooking the main bar floor

entered.detail: metal stairs with green illuminated treads leading upward
wall-mounted sign with 'MADAME SAUVAGE'S PLACE' text
large vertical support column with green accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera moves toward the back of the bar and begins ascending an illuminated metal staircase. Upon reaching the upper balcony, the view opens to overlook the main bar area below, with the geometric chandelier now visible to the left and industrial architecture surrounding the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level seating area with glass railings

events.description: approaching seated NPC who gestures while conversing

agents.ego_description: approaching a seated man at a table who gestures with his hand in conversation

notable_agents.action: man in gray jacket seated with arms crossed, then gesturing while talking

entered.detail: circular glass floor opening with yellow neon rim overlooking the bar below
small metal table with orange glowing object on top

segments.scene_description: Walking along the upper balcony, the camera approaches a seating area with a glass railing overlooking the bar. A man sits at a small table with an orange light, gesturing as if in conversation. The circular glass floor feature reveals the bar area below, and the geometric chandelier hangs nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial alleyway with overhead pipes and metal shutters

events.description: exiting the building back to the exterior urban alley

agents.ego_description: walking out of the establishment into the street and continuing down the alley

large metal pipes and ductwork running along the ceiling
building facades with closed metal roll-up shutters

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the building through a doorway into a dark industrial alleyway at night. Various pedestrians walk along the street lined with metal shutters and overhead pipes. The camera continues walking down the alley, passing other pedestrians in the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark industrial alley into the neon-lit interior of a cyberpunk bar before returning to the urban night. It begins by approaching the illuminated signage of Madame Sauvage's Place, moving through a narrow corridor with yellow vertical lights and past two guards to enter the establishment. As the space opens into a spacious bar dominated by green neon lighting, the camera glides past the counter and under a geometric chandelier before ascending an illuminated metal staircase to an upper balcony. The scene then shifts along the elevated walkway toward a seated man at an orange-lit table, passing a circular glass floor that reveals the main hall below. Finally, the camera exits through a doorway, transitioning back into the dark alleyway to walk among pedestrians beneath overhead pipes and metal shutters.
